75 _30D BLADR_ACDNT_DSCHRG_CD (30d) Bladder Frequency of Accidents: Discharge CHAR 2 A score indicating the frequency of bladder accidents at discharge. Bladder accidents refers to the act of wetting linen or clothing with urine, and includes bedpan and urinal spills. 01 = Five or more accidents in the past 7 days, 02 = Four accidents in
